title: premna integrifolia var. obtusifolia
intro: Premna integrifolia var. obtusifolia is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the Premna or Honey Tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion. Premna integrifolia var. obtusifolia is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal purposes, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations to support overall well-being.
